Title: Requires compliance with the city's uniform land use review procedure
Summary: Requires compliance with the city's uniform land use review procedure.
LawSection: New York City Health and Hospitals Corporation Act
LawCode: Amd §5, NYC Health & Hosp Corp Act
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the New York city health and hospitals corporation act, in relation to requiring compliance with the city's uniform land use review procedure
